title: The 7 Realms [Archived]
description: Explore 7 uniqe worlds in this one single mod!
body:
Welcome to the 7 Realms!

This is one of my first mods uploaded onto Modrinth purely out of Archival purposes, feel free to explore it but it is very poorly designed and I cannot promise that it won't ruin your world.

 

 

**

Original Description:** (Very slightly modified)

The 7 Realms is a brand new mod with well 7 Dimensions inside of it!

Right now the project is still in Alpha and i woudn't recomend using this mod in a modpack yet atleast,

but i've posted the mod on Curse to be able to get feedback, tips and ideas on the mod to make it even better in the future!

 

The Dimensions:

These are the Dimensions currently in the mod:

 

The Ancient Acres:

The Ancient Acres was once a great civilation but what happened to them is uknown only the remains of their structures remain.

More Soon...

 

The EverHaven:

Welcome to a golden paradise where everything is in the shade of yellow.

More Soon...

 

The Harmony Rift:

In Harmony Rift the perfect place to just settle down and take a deep breath becouse here nothing can harm you and the animals living there.

More Soon...

 

The Shadow Realm:

A Dimension in perfect grayscale where Shadow creatures and  Undead beings live together, so if you want to visit i'd be careful.

More Soon...

 

The UnderWorld:

In a place deep deep down somewhere in between the Overworld and The Nether lays the UnderWorld gigantic caves with an mesmerizing blue fog in the distance.

This is the place where Ilager clans come to discuss inportant subjects with other Illager clans so this is NOT the place for the faint of heart.

More Soon...

 

The Crimson Forest:

A fleshy dark scorching climate fills this dimension, here time seem to pass irregularly.

More Soon...

 

The Corrupted Shores:

̶N̸o̶t̵h̴i̷n̶g̷ ̵i̷s̴ ̷r̸e̵a̷l̴l̷y̶ ̵k̸n̴o̴w̶n̶ ̵a̵b̴o̶u̵t̵ ̸t̴h̶i̶s̴ ̸p̸l̵a̷c̷e̸ ̵e̴x̵c̴e̴p̴t̷ ̸f̴o̵r̸ ̶o̸n̴e̶ ̴t̵h̸i̶n̸g̴ ̵w̸h̸i̷c̶h̶ ̶i̵s̶ ̶t̴h̴a̵t̴ ̷t̷h̷i̵s̵ ̵d̶i̷m̴e̸n̴s̴i̷o̶n̷ ̴w̷a̴s̶ ̴a̷ ̷m̷i̷s̷t̶a̴k̸e̷ ̶a̶n̴d̶ ̷s̴h̵o̴u̶l̷d̶ ̴n̵o̴t̷ ̷r̸e̶a̸l̷l̶y̷ ̸e̷x̶i̶s̷t̴ ̴a̶n̴d̶ ̵t̶h̷e̴r̸e̵f̶o̸r̸e̷ ̸i̸s̷ ̴e̸x̴t̷r̷e̵m̸e̵l̶y̴ ̸b̸r̷o̸k̵e̴n̸ ̶a̴n̷d̸ ̶g̷l̶i̴t̵c̸h̷y̸.̷ ̶

T̷h̴e̷r̴e̴ ̷i̸s̸ ̸h̸o̸w̶e̵v̴e̸r̴ ̴a̴ ̶r̵u̶m̷o̸r̶ ̵a̷b̷o̷u̴t̵ ̶t̶h̵e̸ ̸s̷o̷i̶l̸ ̸i̶n̵ ̶t̴h̷i̶s̵ ̶d̴i̵m̷e̸n̵s̵i̶o̵n̸ ̵t̸h̸a̸t̴ ̵i̷t̴ ̸w̵o̸r̴k̶s̵ ̴l̶i̴k̵e̵ ̷a̵ ̷f̵u̵n̴g̷u̴s̴ ̶o̵r̸ ̸a̶ ̵w̸o̷r̶l̶d̷ ̴e̴a̴t̶i̶n̵g̸ ̶i̷n̷f̴e̵c̴t̵i̸o̴n̵ ̴w̸h̵e̸n̵ ̵i̶n̸ ̴c̷o̷n̴t̷a̶c̵t̸ ̶w̸i̷t̷h̸ ̸O̸v̴e̷r̸w̷o̸r̷l̴d̵l̸y̵ ̸m̷a̷t̸e̴r̴i̶a̶l̵s̵,̴ ̶b̷u̵t̵ ̴t̵h̸a̴t̵s̸ ̴j̶u̶s̷t̵ ̸a̸ ̸r̴u̶m̵o̶r̷ ̷r̶i̵g̶h̶t̶?̵

More Soon...

Some Planned Features:

Adding custom dungeons, bosses, effects, loot, gear and mobs into almost every dimension.

Making more custom textures with some having custom animated textures.

More Soon...

Known Issues:

- Some crafting recipies are not yet implemented into the Mod.

- Crafting for portals and lighters are not implemented so only creative spawn in currently possible.

- Grass spread and music is kinda broken or does not work as intended right now for an example every dimensional music starts to play when you enter it's specific portal but it wont play again after that unless you exit and reenter.

- The in-dimensional music is classified as Friendly Creatures so if you want to turn of or lower the dimensional music it's that one instead, but it's recomended to turn the normal "Music" to 0 to avoid 2 songs playing at the same time!

Disclaimer:

This is one of my first mods so please give feedback instead of just trash talking! :D

I use versions like this: V.<Release><Beta><Alpha><_Bugfix>

So as an example let's use "V.2.7.3_02" which translates to:

<ModVersion (V)>.<Release Version Number 2 (V.2)>.<Beta Version Number 7 (V.2.7)>.<Alpha Version Number 3 (V2.7.3)>_<Bugfix Version 2 (V.2.7.3_02)

...

Credits:

A BIG Thanks to all of the music creators which music is beeing used in this mod!

(credited inside the mod with music discs)

 

Good luck and remember to have fun!
